programme.title: Looop Lapeta
programme.desc: Savina is desperate to save her friend Satyajeet after he gets caught up in the money of a dangerous gang, but she finds herself caught in a vicious time loop, facing renewed challenges and trying desperately to rewrite their destiny. Taapsee Pannu, Tahir Raj Bhasin, Dibyendu Bhattacharya, K.C. Shankar, Shreya Dhanwanthary, Aakash Bhatia, Aakash Bhatia, Vinay Chhawal.

programme.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
programme.desc: A free young girl, doesn't like to be pushed to get married, so she has her hold on her life, but when she meets two guys, everything changes. Ayushmann Khurrana, Kriti Sanon, Rajkummar Rao, Pankaj Tripathi, Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari, Bareilly Ki Barfi, Shreyas Jain.

programme.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
programme.desc: A free young girl, doesn't like to be pushed to get married, so she has her hold on her life, but when she meets two guys, everything changes. Ayushmann Khurrana, Kriti Sanon, Rajkummar Rao, Pankaj Tripathi, Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari, Bareilly Ki Barfi, Shreyas Jain.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight.

programme.title: Ek Main Aurr Ek Tu
programme.desc: Rahul meets with Riana in her most desperate moments after she broke up with her boyfriend. They drink a lot and the next day when they wake they discover that they got married. But they fall in love with each others. Kareena Kapoor, Imran Khan, Boman Irani, Shakun Batra, Shakun Batra, Ayesha DeVitre.

programme.title: Batla House
programme.desc: A police officer seeks to arrest terrorists who committed a deadly and violent incident. This incident made him suffer from post-traumatic stress disorder. Nikkhil Advani, Ritesh Shah, John Abraham, Mrunal Thakur, Nora Fatehi, Rajesh Sharma, Ravi Kishan.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Batla House
programme.desc: A police officer seeks to arrest terrorists who committed a deadly and violent incident. This incident made him suffer from post-traumatic stress disorder. Nikkhil Advani, Ritesh Shah, John Abraham, Mrunal Thakur, Nora Fatehi, Rajesh Sharma, Ravi Kishan.

programme.title: Guzzarish
programme.desc: A retired paralyzed famous Indian magician, who is depending completely on his nurse, files a lawsuit to the court for mercy killing. Hrithik Roshan, Aishwarya Rai, Shernaz Patel, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Nafisa Ali, Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Bhavani Iyer.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight.
